title: QUILL Sound Pack Manifest
description: Describes a QSP (.qsp) sound pack: a ZIP archive or directory containing WAV earcon files and this manifest.

version.description: Manifest schema version. Currently must be '1'.

events.description: Map of sound-event ID to relative WAV file path within the pack.

additionalProperties.description: Relative path to a WAV file. Must not use '..' segments.
